data.body:
🔹 Event Schedule

- Season Schedule: 12/23 (Tue) 2:00 AM – 12/29 (Mon) 6:59 PM (UTC)

- Reward Claim Schedule: 12/23 (Tue) 2:00 AM – 1/20/2026 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)

- Please note: ranking rewards can be claimed after the end of the season and the settlement period.

 

🔹 Event Details

- Defeat the Total Assault boss during the event to earn Clear Rewards, Total Points Rewards, and Rank Rewards.

- Please check in-game for reward details.

 

🔹 Terrain, Defense Type, Attack Type
